title: 5 Accessing and Navigating User Management
body_text:
5	Accessing and Navigating User Management
5.1	Accessing User Management
Only User Management Security Officers (Security Officers) have access to User Management, and they must log in with a 2-step security token. See the 2-Step Security Part for information on ordering hard tokens and installing and registering soft tokens. While Central
1 generally assigns the token to new Security Officers during set-up, Security Officers can assign tokens to other Security Officers as described in Chapter 7, Managing 2-Step Security Tokens.
Log in to User Management as follows:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
User Management
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing User Management
Enter the code thatГўВҖВҷs generated on your registered 2-step security token, then select
Done
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Enter Code from the 2-Step Security Token
5.2	Navigating User Management
The following is an overview of the User Management homepage structure. See Figure 5.
ГўВ‘
Manage User
ГўВҖВ“
Use this option to:
ГўВҲВ’
Create, modify, and delete Client Centre Users and Business Users. See Chapter 6, Managing and Deleting Users.
ГўВҲВ’
Modify and delete Security Officers. See Chapter 6, Modifying and Deleting Users.
ГўВҲВ’
Manage application permissions and 2-step security tokens. See Chapter 8, Managing Application Access and Permissions, and Chapter 7, Managing 2-Step Security Tokens.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Manage Requests
ГўВҖВ“ Use this option to view and approve requests that require dual approval. See Chapter 9, Managing Requests.
ГўВ‘Вў
Manage Reports
ГўВҖВ“ Use this option to generate CSV reports. See Chapter 10, Generating Reports.
The content in the main display changes according to the selected option.
Figure 5: The User Management Homepage
END
